# Testing Folder

This directory contains the definitions and documentation for the testing strategy of the Climate-Driven Energy Demand Analytics System.

## Test Documentation Strategy

*   **Automated Tests:** The documentation for [automated tests](automated_tests) consists of the execution reports generated by the CI/CD pipeline. These files are discarded after 1 week of execution and are exclusively in local dev environment.
*   **Manual Tests:** For all manual tests, a detailed test report must be presented. These reports are in [`TEST_CASES.md`](TEST_CASES.md)

## Organization

The testing process is divided into two main categories of Test Cases (TCs):

1.  **Quality Attributes (QAs):** Test cases designed to verify the system's non-functional requirements as defined in [`Requirements/QUALITY_ATTRIBUTES.md`](../Requirements/QUALITY_ATTRIBUTES.md).
2.  **Use Cases (UCs):** Test cases focused on validating the functional requirements and user interactions as defined in [`Requirements/USE_CASES.md`](../Requirements/USE_CASES.md).

The detailed definition of all TCs are found in [`TEST_CASES.md`](TEST_CASES.md).
